zh.lifeSummary: 當John William De Totehyll於1462年出生在英國斯塔福爾易亞斯特 斯塔福爾時，他的父親Hugh John Tuttle22歲，母親Molde Maude Poole26歲。他於1481年與Mary Elizabeth Wells在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1500年在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可享年38歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John William De Totehyll于1462年出生在英国斯塔福爾易亞斯特 斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Hugh John Tuttle22岁，母亲Molde Maude Poole26岁。他于1481年与Mary Elizabeth Wells在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1500年在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可享年38岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When John William De Totehyll was born in 1462, in East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England, his father, Hugh John Tuttle, was 22 and his mother, Molde Maude Poole, was 26. He married Mary Elizabeth Wells in 1481, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1500, in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William De Totehyll est né en 1462, à East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh John Tuttle, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Molde Maude Poole, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth Wells en 1481, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1500, à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John William De Totehyll 1462 in East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh John Tuttle 22 und seine Mutter Molde Maude Poole 26. Er hat 1481 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England Mary Elizabeth Wells geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John William De Totehyll è nato il nel 1462 nel East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh John Tuttle, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Molde Maude Poole, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth Wells nel 1481, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1500, nel Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Walkern, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John William De Totehyllが1462年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエアスト スタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh John Tuttleは22歳，母Molde Maude Pooleは26歳であった。1481年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでMary Elizabeth Wellsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1500年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンで38歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John William De Totehyll(이)가 1462년 영국 스태퍼드실르 이스트 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh John Tuttle(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Molde Maude Poole(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1481년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 Mary Elizabeth Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John William De Totehyll nasceu em 1462, em East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh John Tuttle, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Molde Maude Poole, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth Wells em 1481, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1500, em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William De Totehyll родился в 1462 г. в местности эаст стаффордшир, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh John Tuttle было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Molde Maude Poole, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth Wells в 1481 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1500 г. в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John William De Totehyll nació en 1462, en East Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh John Tuttle, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Molde Maude Poole, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mary Elizabeth Wells en 1481, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1500, en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
